zh.lifeSummary: 當Baudouin VI de Flandre comte de Hainaut於1030年出生在法國諾門迪時，他的父親Baudouin V comte de Flandre et de Hainaut18歲，母親Adèle de France21歲。他於大約1051年與Richilde de Hainaut結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1070年7月23日在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德哈斯農享年40歲，埋葬在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德哈斯農。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Baudouin VI de Flandre comte de Hainaut于1030年出生在法国諾門迪时，他的父亲Baudouin V comte de Flandre et de Hainaut18岁，母亲Adèle de France21岁。他于大约1051年与Richilde de Hainaut结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1070年7月23日在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德哈斯農享年40岁，埋葬在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德哈斯農。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Flandre
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Flanders
meanings: English: ethnic name from Middle English Fla(u)ndres ‘Flanders’, denoting someone from Flanders, a historical region covering parts of modern-day Belgium, France, and the Netherlands. Compare Fleming .

nameMeanings.name: Baudouin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: VI
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Baudouin VI de Flandre comte de Hainaut was born in 1030, in Normandy, France, his father, Baudouin V comte de Flandre et de Hainaut, was 18 and his mother, Adèle de France, was 21. He married Richilde de Hainaut about 1051. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 23 July 1070, in Hasnon, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, at the age of 40, and was buried in Hasnon, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Baudouin VI de Flandre comte de Hainaut est né en 1030, à Normandie, France, son père, Baudouin V comte de Flandre et de Hainaut, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Adèle de France, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Richilde de Hainaut environ 1051. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 23 juillet 1070, à Hasnon, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, à l’âge de 40 ans, et a été enterré à Hasnon, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Baudouin VI de Flandre comte de Hainaut 1030 in Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Baudouin V comte de Flandre et de Hainaut 18 und seine Mutter Adèle de France 21. Er hat um 1051 Richilde de Hainaut geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 23. Juli 1070 im Alter von 40 Jahren in Hasnon, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich und wurde in Hasnon, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Baudouin VI de Flandre comte de Hainaut è nato il nel 1030 nel Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, Baudouin V comte de Flandre et de Hainaut, aveva 18 anni e il suo madre, Adèle de France, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Richilde de Hainaut circa 1051. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 23 luglio 1070, nel Hasnon, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, all'età di 40 anni, e fu sepolto a Hasnon, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Baudouin VI de Flandre comte de Hainautが1030年にフランスノーマンディで生まれた時，父Baudouin V comte de Flandre et de Hainautは18歳，母Adèle de Franceは21歳であった。約1051年にRichilde de Hainautと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1070年7月23日にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスノードハスノンで40歳で死去し，フランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスノードハスノンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Baudouin VI de Flandre comte de Hainaut(이)가 1030년 프랑스 노먼디에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Baudouin V comte de Flandre et de Hainaut(은)는 18세였고, 그의 어머니 Adèle de France(은)는 21세였다. 그는 대략 1051년 Richilde de Hainaut(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1070년 7월 23일 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 노르드 하스넌에서 40세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 노르드 하스넌에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Baudouin VI de Flandre comte de Hainaut nasceu em 1030, em Normandie, França, seu pai, Baudouin V comte de Flandre et de Hainaut, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Adèle de France, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Richilde de Hainaut aproximadamente 1051. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 23 de julho de 1070, em Hasnon, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, com 40 anos, e foi sepultado em Hasnon, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Baudouin VI de Flandre comte de Hainaut родился в 1030 г. в местности норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Baudouin V comte de Flandre et de Hainaut было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Adèle de France, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Richilde de Hainaut около 1051 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 23 июля 1070 г. в местности хаснон, норд, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция в возрасте 40 лет и был похоронен в местности хаснон, норд, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Baudouin VI de Flandre comte de Hainaut nació en 1030, en Normandie, Francia, su papá, Baudouin V comte de Flandre et de Hainaut, tenía 18 años y su mamá, Adèle de France, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Richilde de Hainaut aproximadamente 1051. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 23 de julio de 1070, en Hasnon, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, a la edad de 40 años, y fue sepultado en Hasnon, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia.
